name: Lind
description: Lind is one of the 10,000 players initially trapped in Sword Art Online. He sees himself as [Diavel](https://anilist.co/character/65169/Diavel)'s successor and thus founds the Dragon Knights Brigade, one of the two major clearing guilds early in the game alongside [Kibaou](https://anilist.co/character/65171/Kibaou)'s Aincrad Liberation Squad.
